| | [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17607048/200202595/1683595733?refcode=TrumpVBM_5.23&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmEzYzBiYi1hZDlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKa5CGkbYE7a7_vel0i6Z1BIixHpkk_ZGPlPMnvxqv0=) Last week, President Trump threatened to withhold federal funding from states expanding mail-in and absentee voting during the pandemic. _**[Chip in $25 to help us build the campaign to vote him out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17607050/200202597/-1545171739?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=TrumpVBM_5.23_25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmEzYzBiYi1hZDlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKa5CGkbYE7a7_vel0i6Z1BIixHpkk_ZGPlPMnvxqv0=)**_ Trump himself votes by mail. So, why doesn't he think Americans deserve the same? He's worried about what mail-in elections mean for Republicans. Because when everyone can vote, the GOP loses out. _**[Contribute $12 to elect a leader that puts our health above their political gain.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17607052/200202599/-1545171739?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=TrumpVBM_5.23_12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmEzYzBiYi1hZDlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKa5CGkbYE7a7_vel0i6Z1BIixHpkk_ZGPlPMnvxqv0=)**_ President Trump would rather put Americans' health at risk than give even the perception of expanded voting rights. And it's all so he can keep us from voting him out. We believe Hoosiers deserve a leader that puts our safety above their own political gain. That's why we can't let him get another four years in office. We created our One-Term President Fund so that we can build the campaign to vote Trump out. Every contribution goes toward making calls, sending texts, and making sure Hoosier Democrats vote in November. Because we believe Hoosiers deserve a leader that puts our safety above their own political gain. **[Will you give $5 to help us make Trump a one-term name: Murray Huber
subject: Biggest! Phonebank! Ever!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We're organizing the biggest phonebank ever, and we need you.
#
There are now only 32 days left until the Kentucky primary. Here at Team Booker, we're working hard to make sure that we are reaching every voter possible before the big day comes.
In the past week alone, our movement has grown leaps and bounds. Just two days ago, our volunteers and campaign staff made _over 17,000_ phone calls to voters!
**It's real proof of the grassroots movement we're building here in Kentucky. And we're just getting started.**
**[We're calling on all our supporters to join us for a record-breaking phone bank – The Biggest Phonebank Ever – this Tuesday, May 26, from 5-7 PM ET. Click here to sign up and get more information:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17608506/200251153/126556719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OThjMjQzZi1jMzlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYqzB3hkoySZjcuxOAZgI7GCHU6xIT9srR5eSLqyNzQ=&emci=0184f43f-b09b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=998c243f-c39d-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
****[Join The Biggest Phonebank Ever](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17608507/200251154/126556719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OThjMjQzZi1jMzlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYqzB3hkoySZjcuxOAZgI7GCHU6xIT9srR5eSLqyNzQ=&emci=0184f43f-b09b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=998c243f-c39d-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)****
In a normal election year, we would be knocking doors, holding town halls, and connecting with voters in-person to share our bold, progressive agenda with them. But due to the pandemic, connecting in-person isn't safe right now – which is why our phone banks are so important.
While calling voters isn't the only way we're trying to reach them, it is one of the most personal, important, and effective ways we can connect with them during these times.
**Just two hours of your time next Tuesday afternoon can make a huge difference in our outreach and furthering our campaign strategy.** You do not have to live in Kentucky to participate, nor do you need prior phone banking experience – for anyone interested, there will also be a live training call at 4:30 pm ET right before the phone bank.
**[We want to make our Biggest Phonebank Ever a success – but we need your help to get there. Can we count on you to devote two hours of your time to make calls with us, and be a part of campaign history?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17608508/200251155/126556719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OThjMjQzZi1jMzlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYqzB3hkoySZjcuxOAZgI7GCHU6xIT9srR5eSLqyNzQ=&emci=0184f43f-b09b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=998c243f-c39d-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)**
****[Join The Biggest Phonebank Ever](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17608509/200251156/126556719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OThjMjQzZi1jMzlkLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pYqzB3hkoySZjcuxOAZgI7GCHU6xIT9srR5eSLqyNzQ=&emci=0184f43f-b09b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=998c243f-c39d-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)****
We hope you can join us and help spread the word about Charles' bold, progressive agenda to voters all across the Commonwealth!
Thanks for all you do,
Murray Huber, Field Director
Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Warner
subject: Support the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek --

**The Trump administration refuses to adopt the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA), despite overwhelming support.** Virginia made history in January when our General Assembly made us the 38th state to ratify the ERA and advance the fight to ensure that everyone has equal rights in the eyes of the law, regardless of their sex. Americans have spent decades fighting for this Constitutional Amendment, and now the Trump administration wants to throw it out on a technicality. | Will you sign on to let the administration know you support adding the Equal Rights Amendment to the Constitution? **[Add My Name](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d497/53d9897e/549b4c52/1c88768c/3426755461/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-erapetition")**
---
The administration says the deadline for the ERA's ratification has passed. But the fact is, the House of Representatives already voted to eliminate that deadline. Mark Warner and a bi-partisan group of colleagues followed suit in November, introducing a Senate resolution to do the same. If both chambers vote to eliminate the deadline, the administration won't be able to point to their flimsy excuse for refusing to adopt the ERA. **But Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has refused to let the Senate vote on the resolution to eliminate the ERA deadline.**

Derek, it's clear that this administration will continue to fight progress at every turn. They will continue to resist every effort to provide equal protection for everyone in this country. Our leaders in Washington, including Mark Warner, will continue to fight for equal rights for all, but they need your help.

**[Add your name to our petition to show your support for ratifying the ERA.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d497/53d9897e/549b4c52/1c88768c/3426755461/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-erapetition")**

Thank you,

Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d497/53d9897e/549b4c52/1c88768b/3426755461/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200524_p_1_fl__583__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d497/53d9897e/549b4c52/1c88768a/3426755461/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Here is the difference between myself and my radical, liberal opponent. Amy McGrath wanted to IMPEACH President Trump, while I led the fight to protect him from Nancy Pelosi's partisan circus. Amy McGrath has stated that she is more progressive than anyone else in Kentucky, while I'm proud to be a lifelong Republican and fighter of our conservative values.
Here is the difference between myself and my radical, liberal opponent.

Amy McGrath wanted to IMPEACH President Trump, _**while I led the fight to protect him from Nancy Pelosi 's partisan circus.**_

Amy McGrath has stated that she is more progressive than anyone else in Kentucky, _**while I 'm proud to be a lifelong Republican and fighter of our conservative values.**_

Amy McGrath said President Trump's wall is "stupid", _**while I 've always been working with the President to Make America SAFE Again.**_

The differences between us couldn't be clearer, and now, I need your help to make sure that my opponent NEVER represents the people of our great nation.

[**Friend, we need to raise another $45,000 before midnight tonight to make sure that Kentucky stays RED--can I count on you to help out?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eK5Ua3picOsX6jJHo-XTmfsMcJt_j9DOEf4KGV4_5PHepHjQcKak-N5bw9zGpY2fcGcP-4SiiBNFLsMhakxMF11vR64WokwvOOjOcGYhVkzHB-isIUCl8dPeY4xkcokmWM-tuwd8YUZ-s30662jYNgbYQl7M99CtMO-yJl1JqIQvVds1rQHGTrL0Bc8g6d3I97PFHJ-RfjiYCaSqC5sC8XhszScq0W_1cfWvXwGy_t_eunwk9XjkHIrCxWnx14orwYP9yvJPBUNzR_BF_ArmRGLXDm2HYz-MP00VAP2M85iSHY9DlFYDm2zrWhkQqXLqEYInNeifhJjsUpJbtykPAp194V89WCXA3wIOtm41fF4=&c=DaVqPBxczmFsL67nrcyszdspDIVjVZmvbjhwkkUQetufIVpZFr7_Tg==&ch=ZpjK5vyx2NsXfLEgjA3PuNxDMANW0ekr1tx_5lwljDPodm07qsKoSQ==)

[**Please make a grassroots donation of any size before MIDNIGHT to help us reach our goal so we can keep Kentucky and the Senate RED.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eK5Ua3picOsX6jJHo-XTmfsMcJt_j9DOEf4KGV4_5PHepHjQcKak-N5bw9zGpY2fcGcP-4SiiBNFLsMhakxMF11vR64WokwvOOjOcGYhVkzHB-isIUCl8dPeY4xkcokmWM-tuwd8YUZ-s30662jYNgbYQl7M99CtMO-yJl1JqIQvVds1rQHGTrL0Bc8g6d3I97PFHJ-RfjiYCaSqC5sC8XhszScq0W_1cfWvXwGy_t_eunwk9XjkHIrCxWnx14orwYP9yvJPBUNzR_BF_ArmRGLXDm2HYz-MP00VAP2M85iSHY9DlFYDm2zrWhkQqXLqEYInNeifhJjsUpJbtykPAp194V89WCXA3wIOtm41fF4=&c=DaVqPBxczmFsL67nrcyszdspDIVjVZmvbjhwkkUQetufIVpZFr7_Tg==&ch=ZpjK5vyx2NsXfLEgjA3PuNxDMANW0ekr1tx_5lwljDPodm07qsKoSQ==)

Mitch McConnell

name: John Cornyn
subject: This has to stop
body:
Friend, I know I sent you this article a few days ago, but my colleague in the Senate forwarded it along to me again this morning with an urgent message asking me to reach out to my supporters to do whatever we can to ensure this does not happen: [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_g3FjLoYFrpSvEdbw1qn7XaWqmqarH1rF4knSHdigca3K6F5PnHh4yExEDrtIDRbW4J0L9tk2njAAmcp4Ux1kQXXtuIv6t7T_8FDax_ibDH58O5ZioNfYTNEPDDask25tB1Zw7YN9yVKMbtJvdMxWaTZs9SLO7TfV9sdDCLgWlgEDzR9MtCWxm3ZAVSp9D2mXQbRIyqWC8AJj3YbPGaBhn_QNoTVZHSqwb_jI6RBlM2KVg15gQP_k5yhw0DKkpysOyWfafCpUMTsnRZDCmdkfV_nTRQQHa7WiLgdznsJSGEi6DBWE-aQUvawSLHiyW-yAXV5HDbSgDcMOTlZ5g2ppZWtFKs1rK4_RQergNV6SQ=&c=roIWx6lhNQxITZvooOtg4kH4Z8EHkByoL0aSESzo54KTDrebvysjtw==&ch=rmXf1DDgzphbLo9J9cUUuCJbj5OWYCteFL0XmpDCxJ1H7C9_060IeQ==) We've accomplished a lot in the last few years with a Republican majority, and Friend, I don't think the nation will know what hit them if the Democrats gain control.
Medicare-for-All MAJOR TAX HIKES Green-New-Deal The removal of our Second Amendment freedoms
A lot is at stake this November. I'm doing everything I can in my power to prevent a Far-Left takeover, but these efforts by myself are not enough.
That's why I'm pleading with you to please immediately chip in what you can to help protect the sanctity of our Senate. [**DOUBLE MATCH: ACTIVATED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p_g3FjLoYFrpSvEdbw1qn7XaWqmqarH1rF4knSHdigca3K6F5PnHh4yExEDrtIDRbW4J0L9tk2njAAmcp4Ux1kQXXtuIv6t7T_8FDax_ibDH58O5ZioNfYTNEPDDask25tB1Zw7YN9yVKMbtJvdMxWaTZs9SLO7TfV9sdDCLgWlgEDzR9MtCWxm3ZAVSp9D2mXQbRIyqWC8AJj3YbPGaBhn_QNoTVZHSqwb_jI6RBlM2KVg15gQP_k5yhw0DKkpysOyWfafCpUMTsnRZDCmdkfV_nTRQQHa7WiLgdznsJSGEi6DBWE-aQUvawSLHiyW-yAXV5HDbSgDcMOTlZ5g2ppZWtFKs1rK4U8Am9vB8spo=&c=roIWx6lhNQxITZvooOtg4kH4Z8EHkByoL0aSESzo54KTDrebvysjtw==&ch=rmXf1DDgzphbLo9J9cUUuCJbj5OWYCteFL0XmpDCxJ1H7C9_060IeQ==) I'm grateful to announce that we have a very generous group of donors who too can't bear the thought of our Senate being flipped, so they have graciously decided to DOUBLE-MATCH every dollar that you chip in -- but just for a limited amount of time.

clean_body: Friend, I know I sent you this article a few days ago, but my colleague in the Senate forwarded it along to me again this morning with an urgent message asking me to reach out to my supporters to do whatever we can to ensure this does not happen: == We've accomplished a lot in the last few years with a Republican majority, and Friend, I don't think the nation will know what hit them if the Democrats gain control. Medicare-for-All MAJOR TAX HIKES Green-New-Deal The removal of our Second Amendment freedoms A lot is at stake this November. I'm doing everything I can in my power to prevent a Far-Left takeover, but these efforts by myself are not enough. That's why I'm pleading with you to please immediately chip in what you can to help protect the sanctity of our Senate. == I'm grateful to announce that we have a very generous group of donors who too can't bear the thought of our Senate being flipped, so they have graciously decided to DOUBLE-MATCH every dollar that you chip in -- but just for a limited amount of time. We must act fast. We must show the Far-Left that they have no chance come November. Texas A battleground?!! Even Nancy Pelosi has directed funds from her SuperPAC to defeat Rodney Davis! As a leader in Congress, Rodney is fighting for solutions that serve the interest of the American people instead of those of the far left. Help Rodney fight back against Pelosi's SuperPAC and national liberal interests today! ==. == == == == == == Thank you, Alerts via Rodney for Congress Downstate Illinois is the #1 target for Democrats this year, can we count on you to rush in $15, $10, $5, or even $1, to help Rodney win this race? **== ==** Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress == PO BOX 344 Taylorville, IL 62568 This message reflects the opinions and representations of the Rodney for Congress. name: MJ Hegar Policy Team
subject: Does this concern you, too?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
27 million people have likely been forced off their health insurance.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c0/2310349489/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c7/2310349489/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurvey")
---
Peter -- An estimated 27 MILLION people, including 1.6 million Texans, have lost their health insurance since COVID-19 first hit us. We need to hear from you:

[**Are you concerned about people losing health care?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c7/2310349489/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurvey")
1. [Yes](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c7/2310349489/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurvey")
2. [No](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c7/2310349489/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurvey")
3. [Other](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c7/2310349489/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurvey")

**[Take the survey >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c7/2310349489/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurvey")**
With so many people losing their coverage, it's inconceivable that Sen. Cornyn's allies are trying to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, the safety net that provides health insurance to millions of those who are suffering from job loss. _But they are_ \-- while he remains silent.

MJ is fighting to improve the ACA and to establish a public option that will always be there for Texans, no matter what. **[Will you take MJ's survey on the Affordable Care Act?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c7/2310349489/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurvey")**

\-- Team MJ

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c6/2310349489/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1445&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890059/7f51f7bc/4e7031ce/4ef6a7c5/2310349489/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Invitation to a virtual event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
Last cycle, I traveled to nearly 20 states to flip the House from red to blue. Because I know our biggest, boldest, progressive ideas don't stand a chance unless we can build a new generation of Democ
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390630/55b66746/20db15a7/80eae87/156666772/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Team, Last cycle, I traveled to nearly 20 states to flip the House from red to blue. Because I know our biggest, boldest, progressive ideas don't stand a chance unless we can build a new generation of Democratic majorities - especially in places our party can be too quick to write off. **[So, I wanted to invite you to a (virtual!) grassroots fundraiser on Wednesday, May 27th at 6PM Eastern, where I'm going to be talking with some friends about one place in particular: Texas.](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-EVT-FletcherAllredLD?refcode=E2934-20200524-Invite1LD-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL&amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100")** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390630/55b66746/20db15a7/80eae81/156666772/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-EVT-FletcherAllredLD?refcode=E2934-20200524-Invite1LD-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,other&amount=10") Among the lessons learned from the 2018 midterms: Texas is changing. There is more Democratic support and momentum than there has been in decades. I was proud to support my friends, Rep. Colin Allred and Rep. Lizzie Fletcher, in 2018, when they both won "toss-up" races to flip their seats from red to blue. Now we're all hands on deck to keep up that momentum. Normally, we'd have these kind of events in a back yard in Newton or Fall River, MA - but in today's new normal, we're holding them on Zoom! The good news is this allows me to invite you even though we are miles apart. While we can't meet person to person - this is the next best thing - connecting live online. **[Follow this link to RSVP and chip in $10, and we'll send you the link to this special virtual event with myself, Rep. Colin Allred, and Rep. Lizzie Fletcher. Spots are going fast, but we'd love to have you join our conversation.](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-EVT-FletcherAllredLD?refcode=E2934-20200524-Invite1LD-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SL&amount=$10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100")** Hope you'll join us on Wednesday at 6PM eastern. Stay healthy. Stay safe. clean_body: Last cycle, I traveled to nearly 20 states to flip the House from red to blue. Because I know our biggest, boldest, progressive ideas don't stand a chance unless we can build a new generation of Democ | "" | | Team, Last cycle, I traveled to nearly 20 states to flip the House from red to blue. Because I know our biggest, boldest, progressive ideas don't stand a chance unless we can build a new generation of Democratic majorities - especially in places our party can be too quick to write off. "" "" Among the lessons learned from the 2018 midterms: Texas is changing. There is more Democratic support and momentum than there has been in decades. I was proud to support my friends, Rep. Colin Allred and Rep. Lizzie Fletcher, in 2018, when they both won "toss-up" races to flip their seats from red to blue. Now we're all hands on deck to keep up that momentum. Normally, we'd have these kind of events in a back yard in Newton or Fall River, MA - but in today's new normal, we're holding them on Zoom! The good news is this allows me to invite you even though we are miles apart. While we can't meet person to person - this is the next best thing - connecting live online. "" Hope you'll join us on Wednesday at 6PM eastern. Stay healthy. Stay safe. Keep fighting. - Joe | "" | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". body:
Just as the endorsement mentions, another term for Cory means more wins for Colorado and more progress for America. We need leaders like Cory to fight for us in Washington. And to keep him there, we need you on our team.
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._

name: Joni for Iowa Digital Director
subject: We need to stop Chuck Schumer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
We just found out that Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate outraised us in the weeks ahead of the June 2nd primary. I'm not going to sugarcoat it - this isn't good. Without a strong online fundraising push, we risk Chuck Schumer buying Iowa's Senate seat outright and flipping the Senate Majority. We can't let that happen.
Hey Friend,

I wanted to reach out to give you an update on the Iowa Senate race.

We just found out that Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate outraised us in the weeks ahead of the June 2nd primary. I'm not going to sugarcoat it - this isn't good. Without a strong online fundraising push, we risk Chuck Schumer buying Iowa's Senate seat outright and flipping the Senate Majority. We can't let that happen.

Joni reached out yesterday to see if you were able to make a monthly commitment. I just talked with our accounting team, and it looks like you haven't signed up yet.

I wanted to ask again as I know you are one of Joni's top supporters. [**_You can CLICK HERE to sign up to make a monthly donation of ANY size._**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cudHsR2bY0f-nIcbaJVXafN-6XKrRGhHa07ZVfKj86V74cPW6NJYSGikzjYR-6FlK_TpAWucfDm6WLqWbcTvfLMXpHH9AcLodjd_ovmm0oI0q26aD_3j3PLZkG-2LnGcqEPJWfMAeNKrj-ZQIN0nO-bhitjN6Bv6Wug9UHAOjVgbg7ytdch-sdI0R0xpS5sZQ-fJZ5CMCgzXKI7Px6FtqtOZMGqytlnfruejddhw1vLLt2bfH6Fn7-oQhP-ZIcZxKM0Z7eN45lLQYkf9iLIGhXNPV6FyBBXiK0wNuwpsBHfxBtNggHibCbRNFSBfa0DxY3R_9ShamzkxqbHuyeS6x83vDDpuYgxr3v-PPsrWUh_lmrntbQYfzA==&c=It9Jniyv8VQf8snzvqxWoM2wDkLo7zzk-wPFscUOgKSmcemzDM1CZQ==&ch=edhVEN0mMv0r1jPtKdiALHnFy5y-fpc-sjSHarRd62WUNGl60TxQCQ==)

If you have signed up, don't worry, our records are currently being updated and your commitment has been counted!

I know these are trying times in a lot of different ways. Here at Team Joni, we're working hard to create new ways to stay in contact with Iowans, share Joni's message across the state, and continue building our grassroots team each day. Like all of these efforts, our fundraising efforts have been focused online during this time.

That means, meeting our fundraising goals each month is crucial if we're going to fight back against Chuck Schumer's money machine and carry on strong through November.

[**_Even if it 's $1, $5, or $25, a monthly contribution of any size allows us to spend less time working to meet our monthly goals, and more time building this strong grassroots team._**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cudHsR2bY0f-nIcbaJVXafN-6XKrRGhHa07ZVfKj86V74cPW6NJYSGikzjYR-6FlK_TpAWucfDm6WLqWbcTvfLMXpHH9AcLodjd_ovmm0oI0q26aD_3j3PLZkG-2LnGcqEPJWfMAeNKrj-ZQIN0nO-bhitjN6Bv6Wug9UHAOjVgbg7ytdch-sdI0R0xpS5sZQ-fJZ5CMCgzXKI7Px6FtqtOZMGqytlnfruejddhw1vLLt2bfH6Fn7-oQhP-ZIcZxKM0Z7eN45lLQYkf9iLIGhXNPV6FyBBXiK0wNuwpsBHfxBtNggHibCbRNFSBfa0DxY3R_9ShamzkxqbHuyeS6x83vDDpuYgxr3v-PPsrWUh_lmrntbQYfzA==&c=It9Jniyv8VQf8snzvqxWoM2wDkLo7zzk-wPFscUOgKSmcemzDM1CZQ==&ch=edhVEN0mMv0r1jPtKdiALHnFy5y-fpc-sjSHarRd62WUNGl60TxQCQ==)

I really appreciate your support in this fight, and I know Joni does too.

You can sign up to go monthly at the secure link here: [**https://secure.winred.com/joni-ernst/commit-to-jonis-fight**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cudHsR2bY0f-nIcbaJVXafN-6XKrRGhHa07ZVfKj86V74cPW6NJYSGikzjYR-6FlK_TpAWucfDm6WLqWbcTvfLMXpHH9AcLodjd_ovmm0oI0q26aD_3j3PLZkG-2LnGcqEPJWfMAeNKrj-ZQIN0nO-bhitjN6Bv6Wug9UHAOjVgbg7ytdch-sdI0R0xpS5sZQ-fJZ5CMCgzXKI7Px6FtqtOZMGqytlnfruejddhw1vLLt2bfH6Fn7-oQhP-ZIcZxKM0Z7eN45lLQYkf9iLIGhXNPV6FyBBXiK0wNuwpsBHfxBtNggHibCbRNFSBfa0DxY3R_9ShamzkxqbHuyeS6x83vDDpuYgxr3v-PPsrWUh_lmrntbQYfzA==&c=It9Jniyv8VQf8snzvqxWoM2wDkLo7zzk-wPFscUOgKSmcemzDM1CZQ==&ch=edhVEN0mMv0r1jPtKdiALHnFy5y-fpc-sjSHarRd62WUNGl60TxQCQ==)

Thank you,

Brett Field
Digital Director
Joni for Iowa

Date: May 24, 2020
Subject: Go monthly!
Sender: Joni Ernst

Friend,

This month has proved just how far the Democrats are willing to go to flip Iowa's Senate seat and gain the Senate Majority. And they're gaining serious momentum.

**First,** Chuck Schumer and National Democrats raised over $200,000 for Schumer's handpicked candidate in less than 24 hours.

**Then,** one by one the failed, far-Left 2020 Presidential socialists lined up to support Schumer's handpicked candidate, including Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, and Kamala Harris.

**Now,** Schumer's handpicked candidate outraised our campaign in the final weeks before the June 2nd primary election.

I've said this before, but I'll say it again. Chuck Schumer and the Democrats will buy Iowa's Senate seat outright if we don't do something to stop them.

**[That's why I'm asking you to make a monthly commitment to our fight to protect Iowa's Senate seat.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cudHsR2bY0f-nIcbaJVXafN-6XKrRGhHa07ZVfKj86V74cPW6NJYSGikzjYR-6FlK_TpAWucfDm6WLqWbcTvfLMXpHH9AcLodjd_ovmm0oI0q26aD_3j3PLZkG-2LnGcqEPJWfMAeNKrj-ZQIN0nO-bhitjN6Bv6Wug9UHAOjVgbg7ytdch-sdI0R0xpS5sZQ-fJZ5CMCgzXKI7Px6FtqtOZMGqytlnfruejddhw1vLLt2bfH6Fn7-oQhP-ZIcZxKM0Z7eN45lLQYkf9iLIGhXNPV6FyBBXiK0wNuwpsBHfxBtNggHibCbRNFSBfa0DxY3R_9ShamzkxqbHuyeS6x83vDDpuYgxr3v-PPsrWUh_lmrntbQYfzA==&c=It9Jniyv8VQf8snzvqxWoM2wDkLo7zzk-wPFscUOgKSmcemzDM1CZQ==&ch=edhVEN0mMv0r1jPtKdiALHnFy5y-fpc-sjSHarRd62WUNGl60TxQCQ==) **We need a strong showing with our online contributions to take back the fundraising lead in this race, and we can't do it without your help.

[**_With your support,_**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cudHsR2bY0f-nIcbaJVXafN-6XKrRGhHa07ZVfKj86V74cPW6NJYSGikzjYR-6FlK_TpAWucfDm6WLqWbcTvfLMXpHH9AcLodjd_ovmm0oI0q26aD_3j3PLZkG-2LnGcqEPJWfMAeNKrj-ZQIN0nO-bhitjN6Bv6Wug9UHAOjVgbg7ytdch-sdI0R0xpS5sZQ-fJZ5CMCgzXKI7Px6FtqtOZMGqytlnfruejddhw1vLLt2bfH6Fn7-oQhP-ZIcZxKM0Z7eN45lLQYkf9iLIGhXNPV6FyBBXiK0wNuwpsBHfxBtNggHibCbRNFSBfa0DxY3R_9ShamzkxqbHuyeS6x83vDDpuYgxr3v-PPsrWUh_lmrntbQYfzA==&c=It9Jniyv8VQf8snzvqxWoM2wDkLo7zzk-wPFscUOgKSmcemzDM1CZQ==&ch=edhVEN0mMv0r1jPtKdiALHnFy5y-fpc-sjSHarRd62WUNGl60TxQCQ==) we'll be able to reach our digital goals each month and ensure we have the resources necessary to compete with Chuck Schumer and his backing by the Democratic watches.

I know these are trying times in a lot of different ways. Here at Team Joni, we're working hard to create new ways to stay in contact with Iowans, share Joni's message across the state, and continue building our grassroots team each day. Like all of these efforts, our fundraising efforts have been focused online during this time. That means, meeting our fundraising goals each month is crucial if we're going to fight back against Chuck Schumer's money machine and carry on strong through November. == I really appreciate your support in this fight, and I know Joni does too. You can sign up to go monthly at the secure link here: == Thank you, Brett Field Digital Director Joni for Iowa \--Begin Forwarded Message-- Date: May 24, 2020 Subject: Go monthly! Sender: Joni Ernst Friend, This month has proved just how far the Democrats are willing to go to flip Iowa's Senate seat and gain the Senate Majority. And they're gaining serious momentum. First, Chuck Schumer and National Democrats raised over $200,000 for Schumer's handpicked candidate in less than 24 hours. Then, one by one the failed, far-Left 2020 Presidential socialists lined up to support Schumer's handpicked candidate, including Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, and Kamala Harris. Now, Schumer's handpicked candidate outraised our campaign in the final weeks before the June 2nd primary election. I've said this before, but I'll say it again. Chuck Schumer and the Democrats will buy Iowa's Senate seat outright if we don't do something to stop them. == We need a strong showing with our online contributions to take back the fundraising lead in this race, and we can't do it without your help. == we'll be able to reach our digital goals each month and ensure we have the resources necessary to compete with Chuck Schumer and his backing by the Democratic watches. Will you commit to a monthly contribution of any size? == During these times, online contributions have become one of our main drivers of fundraising, and that means meeting our online digital goals is now more important than ever before. == Thank you for your continued support, Joni Ernst Paid for by Joni for Iowa PO BOX 93441 Des Moines, IA 50393 | | Joni for Iowa | PO BOX 93441, Des Moines, IA 50393 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: A bit of unpleasantness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Hi everyone. I have a bit of unpleasantness to tell you. Outside groups blindly supporting one opponent have attacked my almost four decades of military service. Yes, weirdly, on Memorial Day weekend.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hi everyone. I have a bit of unpleasantness to tell you. Outside groups blindly supporting one opponent have attacked my almost four decades of military service. Yes, weirdly, on Memorial Day weekend. Their charge is that veterans are not welcome to serve in political office. Evidently, I'm winning. That's a bad byline for the Democratic Party. I refute that bizarre outrage a mere 10 days from the Primary Election. **Let 's show them that admirals can be the face of Democratic leadership. _[Click here to help correct the record. Your donation is crucial for the Democratic Party.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc88b/2707153446/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_all_l1")_** Thank you, Admiral Mike Franken
Sioux City, Iowa \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: The Franken Crew
Date: Fri, May 22, 2020 at 3:29 PM
Subject: The Admiral's service is under attack We're not happy, crew. A Washington PAC spent about $1 million to run an attack ad against Admiral Franken. Look, we get that this is part of politics, but certain things are off limits -- and the Admiral's 37-year service record is one of those. We need to push back against these baseless attacks. This isn't just an attack on the Admiral, but an attack on all military personnel -- active duty members, veterans, and their families. **We only have 11 days to correct the record. The Franken Defense Fund is active, but we need your help to fill it up.[Can you chip in any amount?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc884/2707153446/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_l2")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc885/2707153446/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_abx5")
---
[Chip in $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc886/2707153446/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_abx10")
---
[Chip in $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc887/2707153446/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_abx25")
---
[Other amount >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc880/2707153446/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_abxother")
---
The Admiral spent his career defending the United States at home and abroad.
He commanded fleets, led thousands of Sailors, Marines, Air Force personnel, and Soldiers, worked in the Senate for Ted Kennedy, and served as the Navy's chief of legislative affairs under President Obama.
And the ad from an outside group takes a shot at this service to our country.
**We have to push back immediately._[So, chip in to the Franken Defense Fund right now.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc881/2707153446/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_l3")_**
[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc882/2707153446/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_btn")
---
Thank you,
The Franken Crew

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2559/33365068/4a7ca0a6/3f8bc883/2707153446/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200524_em_fr_adresponsekick_nonopens_ftr")

name: Teresa's iPhone
subject: Last chance to help get our campaign ad on TV this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:

Voters have seen the poll putting me in a statistical tie with David Perdue — now we need to reach them on the air when our campaign’s message will matter the most.

Donate as soon as you can and we’ll put your donation directly into increasing this week’s advertising budget to get out the vote: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-statistical-tie?refcode=em052420-2refcode2=16545b8d-019e-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd

Thank you,
Teresa

| | Friends, I'm reaching out today because we are exactly one month away from primary day here in New York's 24th Congressional District. I wanted to take a minute to say thank you for all the support, but I also have to ask you: **Our campaign is trying to raise $10,000 into our TV Ads Fund in order to have the resources to expand our ad buy in the final stretch before the election.[Can you help us reach this important goal?](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b403/388db0e9/8cf8d56/609b8a19/3170518642/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUyNF9UVkFkczVfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_may?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+help+us+reach+this+important+goa&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1")** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b403/388db0e9/8cf8d56/609b8a18/3170518642/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUyNF9UVkFkczVfVTFfWDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_may?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1")

**Voters across our district are voting, team.**
Absentee ballots are in the hands of thousands of key voters -- the voters we need to come out victorious in this primary. So every minute we don't talk to these voters, is a minute they could choose to support our opponent.
**I 'm the only candidate who can flip this seat from red to blue, and that's why I'm humbly asking for your support today. [Please make a donation to our TV Ad Fund so we can reach this $10,000 goal.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b403/388db0e9/8cf8d56/609b8ae2/3170518642/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUyNF9UVkFkczVfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_may?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Please+make+a+donation+to+our+TV+Ad+Fund&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200524_TVAds5_U1_X1")**
Thanks,
Francis

subject: Come meet Rep. Pramila Jayapal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
We hope you are enjoying your holiday weekend! We want to let you know that this upcoming Saturday, Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal will be hosting a Zoom fundraiser for Mondaire | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.321/DPbSho67QO6Ybys10tI1Kw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJQNiDfH-2BDPr8nTaNGJkqx3YHNkS4RKfdbZx5aAOvL4ClEq2hVUATjW-2Fh2R7DjNh6CtP-2BJx0CLytXBJ20VCcCd5hTB71ThLuWqmSqDghc6BW-2FwLp75Plm1Ctli3M1qdCuM-2FplEel7dKQT8nDAQoUWt-2F-2BVSNHT6mESsZKYZSxXegCo-2BsG6ceo0-2FfndXdaKgj9t2mGaRZhv89xKoNNBOsIuVJeT6iFrGAsZ2qRnjH5p4-2FTkmW2S6l1LAfoO1qqlTooM2LfAeeTivfoSE17b3ZsnXw5-2FoZLsRJ-2BOmEIU5nHTnv9A-3D-3D/1VoZ) Friend, **** **** **** We hope you are enjoying your holiday weekend! We want to let you know that this upcoming Saturday, Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal will be hosting a Zoom fundraiser for Mondaire along with her co-hosts, King County Councilmember Girmay Zahilay and State Senator Joe Nguyen!
Rep. Jayapal, who endorsed our campaign last week, has been a fierce advocate for working people and is the lead sponsor of Medicare for All in Congress. We would love for you to join us this Saturday to hear from her about why we need more leaders like Mondaire in Congress. **_[You can purchase a ticket to the event here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.321/DPbSho67QO6Ybys10tI1Kw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJQNiDfH-2BDPr8nTaNGJkqx3RShflr-2BQl9H0fyv-2FZf513v6Doz6kJsbziVt57QBA0oTrHKetu9PM1suHVJNc9l1jhZtcEivPRPuKSSfPKQyNDzv9QCql9yzoYqvQ2JZsknTsw-2FPeI5HTt8cnF1rt3gvFvjHqC3EquXD1eJBzPzHgfCKEaNpk0GudvUsPQZ5KXwCaWuGHAoGndtNLjMz0wGLLlfq-2Fkyba77eFvfI60GMde-2BrlxL7fJw96xPJBF-2BC-2BQSWEFsJNuCOYJPtqBq12hU2v77zA19HW5T0QSPN2Urmyvw-3D-3D/L-3i)_**. The Zoom link will be provided upon receipt.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.321/DPbSho67QO6Ybys10tI1Kw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJQNiDfH-2BDPr8nTaNGJkqx316jBmuarmnodxfAQ6xbOfz-2FB32-2FIU5cMiTHCz0KWYeAKShlXBCdROx2tz13JrpDCNz-2B-2BuPWg1M9q3fSf-2FMAt3jol9sayGLdY5PTBHnAdl3w9wBpQOhIKdxXw1wA5a3GZNy9-2BnigTHoTowCQ8cE1iH-2BZA7onfdxlAwTfbVvgwGKkMl89fNNIzSHwrLHxIagTftKvxa2CtogVK9AGeuQR44eG44CiqK-2ByZ97jqUGdhi-2B2aBUjIXnQXFDQ8-2BBWSyo3yPkK6C3pPsQLA2lpn9Hr6xw-3D-3D/RE-_)
This event comes just before the end of the month, which is a huge fundraising deadline for the campaign. **_Right now_** , we are just about $40,000 from hitting our end-of-month goal. If we want to win in June, we need to hit our goal. **_[Can you make a donation towards our fundraiser with Rep. Jayapal to help us get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.321/DPbSho67QO6Ybys10tI1Kw/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJQNiDfH-2BDPr8nTaNGJkqx3EkqVTlPCTto3-2Bov7inWEnUbOtnEdmvBhHBuVqZoBg2sdmHvHCW5r-2BLEEOD5WTMoE4vj-2FKyLTrLanqxiLYcLydJKHa-2F6o1QzwOFtOUqpLZm-2B356hyKYaHQJ5uVkQcUGeeXC5LG1NtEaQ30grAiQnOP-2B76cEMv0pE5XYTRJCv0XBbikSNN7yV1jGBgUQpukIUF2iYfcL5sS3FGPKwi-2BCaVePEkDai6VjFo7R-2FdrKS2Ya3sJlc1L6ps67AZ2x-2FvjI2pj1yIKuYvehVjTCai0lEH9w-3D-3D/zref)
_**
Thank you, Team Mondaire

clean_body: We hope you are enjoying your holiday weekend! We want to let you know that this upcoming Saturday, Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal will be hosting a Zoom fundraiser for Mondaire | | | Friend, ** We hope you are enjoying your holiday weekend! We want to let you know that this upcoming Saturday, Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal will be hosting a Zoom fundraiser for Mondaire along with her co-hosts, King County Councilmember Girmay Zahilay and State Senator Joe Nguyen! Rep. Jayapal, who endorsed our campaign last week, has been a fierce advocate for working people and is the lead sponsor of Medicare for All in Congress. We would love for you to join us this Saturday to hear from her about why we need more leaders like Mondaire in Congress. . The Zoom link will be provided upon receipt. - This event comes just before the end of the month, which is a huge fundraising deadline for the campaign. Right now , we are just about $40,000 from hitting our end-of-month goal. If we want to win in June, we need to hit our goal. ** Thank you, Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. name: Cornyn Alert
subject: We can flip Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's clear MJ is better suited to fight for Texans in the Senate.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005f/7f51f7bc/4e751952/4ef6a83a/535321589/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005f/7f51f7bc/4e751952/4ef6a838/535321589/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200524.2nd__1447__&amount=10")
---
Hey Peter -- When you compare Senator Cornyn's record with MJ's lifetime of service, there's no question that MJ is better suited to fight for Texans in the Senate. Sen. Cornyn's record includes:
* Spending 18 years accomplishing nothing for Texans in Washington.
* Cowering to DC bosses like Mitch McConnell.
* Voting 20 times to rip access to health care away from millions of Texans.
* Selling Texans out to special interests, from Big Pharma to the gun lobby.

**[It's no wonder Senator Cornyn is vulnerable. We can beat him together -- pitch in to help MJ get it done!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489005f/7f51f7bc/4e751952/4ef6a838/535321589/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200524.2nd__1447__&amount=10")**

In contrast to Sen. Cornyn, MJ's entire life has been about fighting for what's right. She:
* Took on the Taliban when her rescue helicopter was shot down in Afghanistan.
* Faced down the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women.
* Is committed to making sure _every_ Texan has affordable health care.
* Won't take corporate PAC money and is endorsed by End Citizens United for her commitment to ending the influence of money in politics.

MJ is the strongest candidate to take on Sen. Cornyn. With the date of the runoff getting closer, MJ needs your support now more than ever! **Pitch in now to help us keep growing MJ 's grassroots campaign to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: This past week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

It's been a great week for Team Hunt. And as we push forward into the summer, I wanted to share with you some updates on the work I've been doing and the direction my campaign is heading.

Last week, **I joined the tireless volunteers at**[**WHAM Ministries**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCWTmzDedbNU4oiyif3udpEwsoACtXFa92j2Q1wlsD1aDM37Y6HaffBJlzLJXWV8853UPQI2wa3pPq3NWN_2V59pVWfqAufjq0MGHpeBBDrc9xPStwiX65iEhKX91aht3V0aUqJnn8NSgV8pHfN5Vj6Yq_C6VSJt5D5iG_uqlbSA9782FZF1Bm5zeZR6X9LP_YnxXpt523QfsORHSEDpiQsN7xoQdCQbRrgAW4_vKu8lxpBPvQzzlFT8aCyIkPIqXgw%3D%3D) to help distribute food to our neighbors impacted by the coronavirus pandemic. It is energizing to work alongside individuals dedicated to serving one another and a reminder of the resilience Texans have shown throughout this pandemic.

On Wednesday, I released [**my response**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCe9lfNbm4MWe-pzb8c4Q_z3sauoOfG6jnz1tPMqz7F_91N09GyE5bb6MvImJLFB7tLCnD5gKnjPKbdaXp-SMeRjau6wPvTBV5RWcPYdFLh5Ry-T5qEoLYNXis1h2ci4bBsFKXN2BRUXM_0lzZ5QGYDDq1jjukmrFHPaoAMqLy3Ie6bbuwLRDoRoo0lgm4wGYByQqLFdAJod3zzNa_GqJqbc_T9UmnEA26IZsChJuCfl05HkVkKyqV8PULzRUbSgjXA%3D%3D)**to Rep. Fletcher's vote for the HEROES Act** , Nancy Pelosi’s $3 trillion political mockery of the public health and economic crisis. This bill delivers billions of tax payer dollars to illegal immigrants, offers sweeping protections for hardened criminals, and foregoes real, actionable solutions for Houston. The list of flaws within this bill is long, but by far the most outrageous outcome is Fletcher's betrayal of Houstonians in our time of need. Through my campaign, I am working to shed light on the dangerous policies packed into this partisan bill and remind Texans that we can do better. [Click here to watch the video](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCe9lfNbm4MWe-pzb8c4Q_z3sauoOfG6jnz1tPMqz7F_9d8VqnrfKt5aXYsYwo__y2yvgPOAbAZLkpgem_9fBzq4l9vOUhUCXH2Zpuf-ve_zhZKzNf0aN41VdBLLCwAPKH1Z6zyO3cGgoeqfJYZtnP7pPEknI-MWVPvPdrcynjS1zfye0X4Gcxq8hhMY6uD31fALShM-UoNrS0zgeJcelA55QDisDgB6h7weLuQGpCqAzLTaHW96J03MwzTdioveHpw%3D%3D).

On Friday, **I sat down with Congressman Will Hurd (TX-23) to delve into the[ topic of cybersecurity](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCfdjql5JDu4ovgkH_AyGybmBc5dlDX90BEaEC2zbVWOHPZyLHFMUtLD3C0bxDZiQVZ2cNipNBgn4e1NzwgP2XCxcAuWDJST_N22Z9L7XBDnCoHy1-JnIO_SYS4paSuiMMv0nW4F6mMHJLsHWO6jZ94W4SLN-6hFivn9lpf0JNH725zGdfMV5iEIi9YI08M8spYRI-LzAqNn8f3Y9HTQJWWRJf8LrxRgZw9azDHzfYnhi2iYgQZmzcYnIaGN5xZ2LKCziN8e1ffzx_l1O2MYYyr45g_1j_d0XAUn0bsxwdlgd)**. Congressman Hurd has been a brilliant voice in the security and intelligence space and we discussed the challenges and opportunities cybersecurity presents for both lawmakers and citizens. Like so many things, cybersecurity is a domain where we can find solutions that make America safer and our economy stronger if we are willing to have a dialogue and work together.

On Saturday, our team **contributed to the Harris County Republican Party's Fabric Drop to support “**[**Masks of Hope**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCdvOVE529XweQQfyOkuhX8j2NlqVutVheSyGPhtGec7cALHh64qZAlam-xeVQLzEoWFMyljCAnKMJBDcRAetZoivSBl4F7tto7Px1_F7bzPrUOHZOSIIxj6X7AyzeVZi0mQe3Pesxw-nveqbBdR1uFvAaQLdB8AR1-v3y4QSHpBB74JG2bpbcNItf2V5deN_oU_lK2w5bPWSy4wfIg-ONzKdbd-IuH2uyn6r7S12Ew_gYdIFWUb7gf2dz5-n4Mtayw%3D%3D)**.”** “Masks of Hope” is doing great work providing free masks to frontline workers, including medical providers and first responders. Supporting programs like these is an opportunity to remind those leading the fight against coronavirus that we are all in this together.

_In case you missed it_ : Earlier this week you may have seen me in this [**_New York Times article_**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCcH1Kv7ZBt7BaOsS_MZ9DrRb8ow-QqyIzc6ibuXoo8mwHOMmHg_kEF4DPNMJKDusMPR1WeZQZNHNoFP6HMOiiKFTWDsqoCMpNmrW7nAYpfUJmpApKNQE2dqxL2LYk4aKZuqkbgBMBBA56cs0w4VNLaRZN31TLTuwyj14oEvjRblsq_KCIegOrgtLMhmi0TjXiSJX751Sf4pKARlN9XT4Ug7sDLB98nHIsHVEWaxoy7tkYDyqB1KyGJmw6uerZVmFZCk-JpSLHEGSPyCk4BiU8-JKD25dtiGU8LNxsQ_vkwp5Uon2gNhbPJ1-Drzrtp4jctprDisAluWqg3O3MvfZtxE%3D)**highlighting the strong message of my campaign** and bringing attention to our campaign as we continue to bring our conservative values to the next generation.

Each week brings new opportunities to work with the great people of the 7th District and I am so glad you are joining us in our journey to victory in November. If you are interested in getting involved with our campaign please just [click here to sign up today](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCQAzxbsvW3PxyhnHFl26MrOK_JJa-9RHqZN29xtwGqwd0h5gM6isZYV7XtUOW5--tNPDiSVh2X8UJgvO4puFty7FVppjPojjroR2Z79fnRrja6hqySvEl8bpikUAw4vtiZmmLhJS7KXiMek8yyVEIqDdyhOyXIwer32qqzcdKZFQcPN3H6ZJPGr45hBsrID1JDT7W_nQp9dVdxNgrgLf0MyqehUGMfng8J5paheYGrBA5erlQ2_fjTi5cXdwGMS22A%3D%3D).

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=642d9191617c4f5bbbb681d249b7cbe0&_e=XVMVickr7mKLY0ERAfLlCbkTtwmH5Q-omnNlfSfMlZ_nZAqf3fSmYttOVqL3sswrY8WOaBTdVld-V7Ta2flmEaUEpnjfv2xc3rSm4rMEqqu014WVqHnXW0R46CKL0aA2eWSI4sirTx5c4hlC8MpkKeFFbBotANb2hfWMq800LHlD6I8UuSId9ASNUIo14KMaIedW3NBZqjrE_Lo7rt6PKA6JJdexj176lU4L3PG6JVSS1u7mUSajdRD5RhgRh147Jrv5RTMsv25knz1p1C4-jVi7t0M-75IGnZQbCunIesI%3D)****

clean_body: Friend, It's been a great week for Team Hunt. And as we push forward into the summer, I wanted to share with you some updates on the work I've been doing and the direction my campaign is heading. Last week, I joined the tireless volunteers at to help distribute food to our neighbors impacted by the coronavirus pandemic. It is energizing to work alongside individuals dedicated to serving one another and a reminder of the resilience Texans have shown throughout this pandemic. On Wednesday, I released Rep. Fletcher's vote for the HEROES Act , Nancy Pelosi’s $3 trillion political mockery of the public health and economic crisis. This bill delivers billions of tax payer dollars to illegal immigrants, offers sweeping protections for hardened criminals, and foregoes real, actionable solutions for Houston. The list of flaws within this bill is long, but by far the most outrageous outcome is Fletcher's betrayal of Houstonians in our time of need.
